title: The modified Camassa-Holm equation on the half line: a Riemann--Hilbert approach
summary:
We consider the initial-boundary value (IBV) problem for the modified Camassa--Holm (mCH) equation $
\tilde m_t+\left((\tilde u^2-\tilde u_x^2+2\tilde u)\tilde m\right)_x = 0$, $\tilde m:=\tilde u-\tilde u_{xx}+1$ on the half line
  $x \ge 0$. We provide a characterization of the solution of the IBV
  problem in terms of the solution of a matrix Riemann--Hilbert (RH) factorization
  problem in the complex plane of the spectral parameter. The data of this RH problem
  are determined in terms of spectral functions associated with the initial and boundary values
  of the solution, whose compatibility is characterized in spectral terms.

AI.tldr: 利用矩阵Riemann-Hilbert问题方法，在半直线上建立了修正Camassa-Holm方程初边值问题的谱特征化
AI.motivation: 研究修正Camassa-Holm方程在半直线上的初边值问题，该方程是重要的可积浅水波模型，具有峰状孤子解，需要发展有效的解析方法处理边界条件
AI.techniques: 使用逆散射变换方法，通过谱函数关联初值和边值，构造矩阵Riemann-Hilbert问题，利用谱理论处理初边值相容性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了修正Camassa-Holm方程初边值问题的解与复谱参数平面上的矩阵Riemann-Hilbert问题解之间的等价关系，给出了初边值相容性的谱特征化条件
AI.significance: 为可积偏微分方程的初边值问题提供了统一的解析框架，扩展了逆散射方法的应用范围，对可积系统的边界控制理论有重要贡献

title: Blow-up suppression of the Patlak-Keller-Segel-Navier-Stokes system via Taylor-Couette flow
summary: Motivated by the use of Taylor-Couette flow in extracorporeal circulation devices [K$\ddot{\rm o}$rfer et al., 2003, 26(4): 331-338], where it leads to an accumulation of platelets and plasma proteins in the vortex center and therefore to a decreased probability of contact between platelets and material surfaces and its protein adsorption per square unit is significantly lower than laminar flow. Increased platelet adhesion or protein adsorption on the device surface can induce platelet aggregation or thrombosis, which is analogous to the ``blow-up phenomenon" in mathematical modeling. Here we mathematically analyze this stability mechanism and demonstrate that sufficiently strong flow can prevent blow-up from occurring. In details, we investigate the two-dimensional Patlak-Keller-Segel-Navier-Stokes system in an annular domain around a Taylor-Couette flow $U(r,θ)=A\big(r+\frac{1}{r} \big)(-\sinθ, \cosθ)^{T}$ with $(r,θ)\in[1,R]\times\mathbb{S}^{1}$, and prove that the solutions are globally bounded without any smallness restriction on the initial cell mass or velocity when $A$ is large.

AI.tldr: 证明了在强Taylor-Couette流作用下，二维Patlak-Keller-Segel-Navier-Stokes系统的解全局有界，无需初始细胞质量或速度的小性限制。
AI.motivation: 研究Taylor-Couette流在体外循环装置中的应用，该流动导致血小板和血浆蛋白在涡旋中心聚集，减少血小板与材料表面的接触，从而降低血小板粘附和血栓形成风险，这类似于数学建模中的"爆破现象"。
AI.techniques: 在环形区域中分析二维Patlak-Keller-Segel-Navier-Stokes系统，利用Taylor-Couette流$U(r,θ)=A\big(r+\frac{1}{r} \big)(-\sinθ, \cosθ)^{T}$的强对流效应，通过能量估计和流体力学稳定性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 当参数$A$足够大时，系统解全局有界，无需对初始细胞质量或速度施加小性限制，证明了强流动可以防止爆破现象的发生。
AI.significance: 为体外循环装置设计提供了数学理论支持，揭示了强对流在抑制血栓形成中的关键作用，将生物医学现象与PDE爆破理论联系起来，拓展了Keller-Segel模型与Navier-Stokes耦合系统的分析。

title: Green functions, Hitchin's formula and curvature equations on tori II: Rectangular torus
summary:
Let $G(z)$ be the Green function on the flat torus $E_τ=\mathbb{C}/(\mathbb{Z}+\mathbb{Z}τ)$ with the singularity at $0$. Lin and Wang (Ann. Math. 2010) proved that $G(z)$ has either $3$ or $5$ critical points (depending on the choice of $τ$). Here we study the sum of two Green functions which can be reduced to $G_p(z):=\frac12(G(z+p)+G(z-p))$. In Part I \cite{CFL}, we proved that for any $p$ satisfying $p\neq -p$ in $E_τ$, the number of critical points of $G_p(z)$ belongs to $\{4,6,8,10\}$ (depending on the choice of $(τ, p)$) and each number really occurs.
  In the Part II of this series, we study the important case $τ=ib$ with $b>0$, i.e. $E_τ$ is a rectangular torus. By developing a completely different approach from Part I, we show the existence of $8$ real values $d_1<d_2<\cdots<d_7<d_8$ such that if $$\wp(p)\in (-\infty, d_1]\cup [d_2, d_3]\cup [d_4, d_5]\cup [d_6, d_7]\cup [d_8,+\infty),$$ then $G_p(z)$ has no nontrivial critical points; if $$\wp(p)\in (d_1, d_2)\cup (d_3, d_4)\cup (d_5, d_6)\cup (d_7, d_8),$$ then $G_p(z)$ has a unique pair of nontrivial critical points that are always non-degenerate saddle points. This allows us to study the possible distribution of the numbers of critical points of $G_p(z)$ for generic $p$. Applications to the Painlevé VI equation and the curvature equation are also given.

AI.tldr: 在矩形环面上研究两个Green函数之和的临界点分布，给出了临界点存在性的精确条件
AI.motivation: 研究平坦环面上两个Green函数之和的临界点问题，这是Lin和Wang关于单个Green函数临界点研究的自然推广，在Painlevé VI方程和曲率方程中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 发展了与第一部分完全不同的新方法，利用椭圆函数理论，特别是Weierstrass ℘函数，通过分析℘(p)的值域来刻画临界点的存在性
AI.main_theorems: 对于矩形环面τ=ib，存在8个实数值d₁<d₂<⋯<d₈，使得：当℘(p)在特定区间时G_p(z)无非平凡临界点；当℘(p)在其他区间时G_p(z)有唯一一对非退化鞍点
AI.significance: 完全解决了矩形环面上该问题的临界点分布，为研究一般环面上的情况提供了重要工具，在Painlevé VI方程和曲率方程中有直接应用

title: A new proof of the Théorème de Structure related to a weak solution to the Navier-Stokes equations
summary: It is well known that a Leray's weak solution to the Navier-Stokes Cauchy problem enjoys a partial regularity which is known in the literature as the Théorème de Structure of a Leray's weak solution. As well, this result has been extended by some authors to the case of the IBVP. In this note, we achieve the Théorème de Structure by means of a new proof. Our proof is based on a priori estimates for a suitable approximating sequence. In this way our result covers a more general setting in the sense that, e.g., we can also include the case of the weak solutions furnished by Hopf for an IBVP in bounded domains without requiring an energy inequality in a strong form, but just employing a priori estimates on the Galerkin approximation.

AI.tldr: 提出Navier-Stokes方程Leray弱解结构定理的新证明方法，基于逼近序列的先验估计，推广了Hopf在无界域中弱解的结果。
AI.motivation: Navier-Stokes方程的Leray弱解具有部分正则性，这一结果被称为"结构定理"。已有文献将该结果扩展到初边值问题(IBVP)。本文旨在通过新证明方法重新建立这一结构定理，覆盖更一般的设置。
AI.techniques: 基于合适逼近序列的先验估计方法，避免使用强形式的能量不等式，仅利用Galerkin逼近的先验估计。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Navier-Stokes方程Leray弱解的结构定理新证明，特别适用于无界域中Hopf构造的弱解，不要求强形式的能量不等式。
AI.significance: 提供了结构定理的更简洁证明框架，扩展了结果的应用范围，特别对无界域问题和仅具有先验估计的弱解情况具有重要意义。

title: Resolvent trace asymptotics for operators in the Shubin class
summary: A new pseudodifferential calculus of Shubin type is introduced. The calculus contains operators depending on a non negative real parameter as well as operators independent of the parameter. Resolvents of Shubin type pseudodifferential operators are constructed and their trace expansion is obtained.

AI.tldr: 引入新的Shubin型伪微分算子演算，构造其预解式并得到迹展开公式。
AI.motivation: 研究Shubin型伪微分算子的解析性质，特别是包含非负实参数依赖的算子，为这类算子的谱分析和量子力学应用提供数学基础。
AI.techniques: Shubin型伪微分算子演算、参数依赖算子理论、预解式构造、迹展开技术、谱分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了包含参数依赖算子的新Shubin型伪微分演算；2. 构造了Shubin型伪微分算子的预解式；3. 获得了预解式的迹展开公式。
AI.significance: 扩展了Shubin演算的理论框架，为量子力学中哈密顿算子的谱分析提供新工具，在数学物理和谱理论中有重要应用。

title: Asymptotic Behavior of Rupture Solutions for the Elliptic MEMS Equation with Hénon-Type Term
summary: For an elliptic MEMS equation with Hénon-type term, $Δu = λ|x|^α/u^{p} + F$, we study rupture solutions, i.e. solutions for which $u(x_0)=0$ at some point $x_0$, also $x_0$ is called a rupture point. In this paper we focus on the special case where the rupture occurs at the origin. According to the different Hénon-type exponents $α$, we analyze the asymptotic behavior of such solutions near the origin and derive a full asymptotic expansion of arbitrary order in a neighborhood of the origin. Moreover, for both radial solutions and non-radial solutions with asymptotic radial condition, we prove the existence of rupture solutions near the rupture point by constructing it.

AI.tldr: 研究带Hénon型项的椭圆MEMS方程在原点破裂解的渐近行为和存在性
AI.motivation: 研究MEMS（微机电系统）方程中带Hénon型项Δu = λ|x|^α/u^p + F的破裂解，即满足u(x₀)=0的解，特别关注在原点发生破裂的情况，分析其渐近行为并证明存在性
AI.techniques: 渐近展开分析、构造性证明方法、径向解分析、非径向解的渐近径向条件处理
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对不同的Hénon指数α，推导原点附近破裂解的渐近行为；2) 建立原点邻域内任意阶的完整渐近展开；3) 证明径向解和满足渐近径向条件的非径向破裂解的存在性
AI.significance: 为MEMS方程中奇异非线性问题的数学分析提供理论工具，对理解物理系统中破裂现象（如薄膜破裂）的数学模型有重要意义，扩展了Hénon型非线性椭圆方程的理论

title: Bifurcation from bubbles in nonconvex cones
summary: We investigate the Neumann problem for the critical semilinear elliptic equation in cones. The standard bubble provides a family of radial solutions, which are known to be the only positive solutions in convex cones. For nonconvex cones, symmetry breaking may occur and the symmetry breaking is related to the first nonzero Neumann eigenvalue of the Laplace Beltrami operator on the domain $D\subset§^{N-1}$, that spans the cone. We construct a one-parameter family of domains on the sphere whose first eigenvalue crosses the threshold at which the bubble loses stability. Under the assumption that this eigenvalue is simple, we prove, via the Crandall Rabinowitz bifurcation theorem, the existence of a branch of nonradial solutions bifurcating from the standard bubble. Moreover we show that the bifurcation is global.

AI.tldr: 在非凸锥中构造了从标准气泡解分岔出的非径向解分支，揭示了对称破缺现象
AI.motivation: 研究临界半线性椭圆方程在锥形区域上的Neumann问题，探索非凸锥中对称破缺现象与Laplace-Beltrami算子第一非零特征值的关系
AI.techniques: 使用Crandall-Rabinowitz分岔定理，构造球面上的一参数区域族，分析特征值穿越阈值时的稳定性变化
AI.main_theorems: 在假设特征值简单的情况下，证明了从标准气泡解分岔出非径向解分支的存在性，并证明该分岔是全局的
AI.significance: 首次系统研究非凸锥中临界椭圆方程的对称破缺现象，建立了几何特征值与解对称性之间的精确联系，为理解非线性椭圆方程在奇异区域上的解结构提供了新视角

title: On the formation of microstructure and the occurrence of vortices in a singularly perturbed energy related to helimagnetism: a scaling law result
summary: In this work, singularly perturbed energies arising from discrete $J_1$-$J_3$-models are studied. The energies under consideration consist of a non-convex bulk term and a higher-order regularizing term and are subject to incompatible boundary conditions. In contrast to existing results in the literature, in this work, admissible fields are not necessarily gradient fields, instead their curl is linked to topological singularities, so-called vortices, in the discrete $J_1$-$J_3$-model. The main result of this work is a scaling law for the minimal energy with respect to three parameters: one measuring the incompatibility of the boundary conditions, the second measuring the strength of the regularizing term, and the third being related to the interatomic distance in the discrete model. The shown result implies in particular that in certain parameter regimes, minimizers necessarily develop vortices. A key tool in the analysis is a careful modification of the celebrated ball-construction technique that, due to a lack of rigidity, considers simultaneously both the bulk energy and the regularizing term.

AI.tldr: 研究了离散$J_1$-$J_3$模型中的奇异扰动能量，建立了最小能量的标度律，揭示了在某些参数范围内极小化子必然产生涡旋结构。
AI.motivation: 研究离散$J_1$-$J_3$模型中的奇异扰动能量问题，该模型包含非凸体能量项和高阶正则化项，并受不相容边界条件约束。与现有文献不同，本文考虑的可容许场不一定是梯度场，其旋度与离散模型中的拓扑奇点（涡旋）相关。
AI.techniques: 主要采用球构造技术的精细修改，由于缺乏刚性，同时考虑体能量项和正则化项；分析涉及三个参数的标度律：边界条件不相容性、正则化项强度、离散模型中的原子间距。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了最小能量关于三个参数的标度律：边界条件不相容性参数、正则化项强度参数、离散模型原子间距参数；证明了在某些参数范围内，极小化子必然发展出涡旋结构。
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异扰动能量理论到非梯度场情形，揭示了涡旋形成的必要条件，为理解离散模型中拓扑缺陷的涌现提供了数学框架，对材料科学中缺陷形成机制有重要理论意义。

title: Entropy and Fisher information in non-convex domains: one chain to rule them all
summary: We prove that the (square root) Fisher information functional is a strong Wasserstein upper gradient of the entropy on non-convex Riemannian domains. This fills a gap in the literature by allowing one to completely dispense from $λ$-displacement convexity arguments. Along the way we establish a novel quantitative short-time control of the Fisher information along the Neumann heat flow, and establish an exact chain rule under stronger $AC_2$ assumptions typically satisfied by curves of measures obtained as limits of JKO schemes.

AI.tldr: 证明了Fisher信息泛函是熵在非凸黎曼区域上的强Wasserstein上梯度，无需λ-位移凸性假设
AI.motivation: 在最优输运理论中，通常需要λ-位移凸性假设来建立熵的梯度流理论。本文旨在填补文献空白，证明在非凸黎曼区域上，Fisher信息泛函可以作为熵的强Wasserstein上梯度，从而完全摆脱λ-位移凸性论证的限制。
AI.techniques: 使用Wasserstein几何、Neumann热流分析、JKO格式极限曲线、AC₂假设下的精确链式法则、Fisher信息的短时控制技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. Fisher信息泛函是熵在非凸黎曼区域上的强Wasserstein上梯度；2. 建立了Fisher信息沿Neumann热流的定量短时控制；3. 在AC₂假设下建立了精确链式法则，适用于JKO格式极限曲线
AI.significance: 该结果扩展了最优输运和梯度流理论的应用范围，允许在更一般的非凸区域上建立熵的梯度流理论，为研究非凸区域上的扩散过程和变分问题提供了新工具，对偏微分方程和几何分析有重要意义。

title: Higher-order diffusion and Cahn-Hilliard-type models revisited on the half-line
summary: In this paper, we solve explicitly and analyze rigorously inhomogeneous initial-boundary-value problems (IBVP) for several fourth-order variations of the traditional diffusion equation and the associated linearized Cahn-Hilliard (C-H) model (also Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation), formulated in the spatiotemporal quarter-plane. Such models are of relevance to heat-mass transfer phenomena, solid-fluid dynamics and the applied sciences. In particular, we derive formally effective solution representations, justifying a posteriori their validity. This includes the reconstruction of the prescribed initial and boundary data, which requires careful analysis of the various integral terms appearing in the formulae, proving that they converge in a strictly defined sense. In each IBVP, the novel formula is utilized to rigorously deduce the solution's regularity and asymptotic properties near the boundaries of the domain, including uniform convergence, eventual (long-time) periodicity under (eventually) periodic boundary conditions, and null non-controllability. Importantly, this analysis is indispensable for exploring the (non)uniqueness of the problem's solution and a new counter-example is constructed. Our work is based on the synergy between: (i) the well-known Fokas unified transform method and (ii) a new approach recently introduced for the rigorous analysis of the Fokas method and for investigating qualitative properties of linear evolution partial differential equations (PDE) on semi-infinite strips. Since only up to third-order evolution PDE have been investigated within this novel framework to date, we present our analysis and results in an illustrative manner and in order of progressively greater complexity, for the convenience of readers. The solution formulae established herein are expected to find utility in well-posedness studies for nonlinear counterparts too.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Fokas统一变换方法，对四阶扩散方程及其变体在时空四分之一平面上的初边值问题，给出了显式解表示并进行了严格分析。
AI.motivation: 研究四阶扩散方程及其变体（如线性化Cahn-Hilliard方程、Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程）在时空四分之一平面上的初边值问题，这些模型在热质传递、固流动力学和应用科学中具有重要性。
AI.techniques: 结合Fokas统一变换方法和新近发展的严格分析框架，处理积分项的收敛性，分析解在边界附近的渐近性质，并构造反例。
AI.main_theorems: 推导了有效的显式解表示公式，严格证明了其有效性；分析了解的正则性和边界渐近性质（包括一致收敛性、长期周期性）；证明了零不可控性；构造了新的反例以研究解的非唯一性。
AI.significance: 首次将新分析框架应用于四阶演化PDE，为非线性问题的适定性研究提供基础，对热质传递、相场模型等应用领域有重要理论价值。

title: Group Classification (1+2)-dimensional Linear Equation of Asian Options Pricing
summary: We consider a class of (1+2)-dimensional linear partial differential of Asian options pricing. Special cases have been used to models of financial mathematics. We carry out group classification of a class equations. In particular, the maximum dimension Lie invariance algebra within the above class is eight-dimensional. It is shown that an equation with such an algebra can be transformed into the linear Kolmogorov equation with the help of the point transformations of variables. Using the operators of invariance algebra symmetry reduction is carried out and invariant exact solutions are constructed for some equations.

AI.tldr: 对一类(1+2)维线性偏微分方程进行李群分类，发现最大维数为八维的李对称代数，并构造了精确解。
AI.motivation: 研究一类(1+2)维线性偏微分方程，这类方程在金融数学中用于亚式期权定价模型，需要对其进行系统性的对称性分析。
AI.techniques: 李群分类方法、点变换理论、对称约化技术、不变解构造。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 确定了该类方程的最大维数李对称代数为八维；2) 证明了具有八维对称代数的方程可通过点变换化为线性Kolmogorov方程；3) 利用对称代数算子进行了对称约化并构造了某些方程的精确不变解。
AI.significance: 为金融数学中的亚式期权定价模型提供了系统的对称性分析框架，建立了与经典Kolmogorov方程的联系，为求解复杂金融偏微分方程提供了新方法。
